hero.title: Hi There, I'm Cheata
hero.intro1: Welcome to my portfolio. I'm a passionate web developer from Cambodia. I enjoy building modern websites and exploring new technologies.
hero.intro2: My journey in web development started with curiosity, and now it has become my passion. I love bringing ideas to life through both front-end and back-end development.

projects.title: Here is My Project
projects.description: Some of the projects I have worked on and explored during my learning journey.

items.title: E-Commerce Furniture Store
items.description: This project focuses on an E-Commerce platform for a Furniture Store.

items.title: Blockchain Landing Page Template
items.description: Explore this template website that provides information about Blockchain technology.

items.title: Coffee Store Landing Page
items.description: Created for a university midterm exam, this project showcases a landing page for a coffee store.

items.title: Online Pizza Delivery Platform
items.description: A pizza delivery platform enabling customers to conveniently order online.

items.title: CMS Dashboard with Next.js
items.description: This project explores Next.js for building a modern CMS dashboard.

items.title: Personal Portfolio
items.description: Learn more about me and discover parts of my personal and professional journey.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: Hi, I'm Socheata Thai рҹ‘Ӣ I am from Cambodia and passionate about web development, design, and technology.

I enjoy learning new tools, improving my development skills, and creating useful digital experiences. Whether it is a landing page, admin dashboard, or e-commerce site, I like the full process of building.
My goal is to keep growing as a developer and create projects that are clean, practical, and meaningful.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to update this section with your real links later.

fields.label: Message
fields.value: Thank you for visiting my portfolio.

km.metaDescription: бһӮбҹҒбһ бһ‘бҹҶбһ–бҹҗбһҡ Portfolio бһҡбһ”бһҹбҹӢ Socheata Thai

items.title: Landing Page бһҹбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһ бһ¶бһ„бһҖбһ¶бһ бҹ’бһңбҹҒ
items.description: бһӮбһҳбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһ„бһҹбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ„бһҳбһ’бҹ’бһҷбһҳбһҶбһҳбһ¶бһҹ бһ”бһ„бҹ’бһ бһ¶бһү Landing Page бһҹбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһ бһ¶бһ„бһҖбһ¶бһ бҹ’бһңбҹҒбҹ”

about.title: бһўбҹҶбһ–бһёбһҒбҹ’бһүбһ»бҹҶ
paragraphs: бһҹбһҪбһҹбҹ’бһҸбһё бһҒбҹ’бһүбһ»бҹҶбһҲбҹ’бһҳбҹ„бҹҮ Socheata Thai рҹ‘Ӣ бһҒбҹ’бһүбһ»бҹҶбһҳбһҖбһ–бһёбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһ‘бҹҒбһҹбһҖбһҳбҹ’бһ–бһ»бһҮбһ¶ бһ бһҫбһҷбһ…бһјбһӣбһ…бһ·бһҸбҹ’бһҸ Web Development, Design бһ“бһ·бһ„бһ”бһ…бҹ’бһ…бҹҒбһҖбһңбһ·бһ‘бҹ’бһҷбһ¶бҹ”

бһҒбҹ’бһүбһ»бҹҶбһ…бһјбһӣбһ…бһ·бһҸбҹ’бһҸбһҹбҹ’бһңбҹӮбһ„бһҷбһӣбҹӢбһ§бһ”бһҖбһҡбһҺбҹҚбһҗбҹ’бһҳбһёбҹ— бһҖбҹӮбһӣбһҳбҹ’бһўбһҮбҹҶбһ“бһ¶бһүбһўбһ—бһ·бһңбһҢбҹ’бһҚбһ“бҹҚ бһ“бһ·бһ„бһ”бһ„бҹ’бһҖбһҫбһҸбһ”бһ‘бһ–бһ·бһҹбҹ„бһ’бһ“бҹҚбһҢбһёбһҮбһёбһҗбһӣбһҠбҹӮбһӣбһҳбһ¶бһ“бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҷбҹ„бһҮбһ“бҹҚбҹ” бһҳбһ·бһ“бһҗбһ¶ Landing Page, Admin Dashboard бһ¬ E-Commerce бһҒбҹ’бһүбһ»бҹҶбһ…бһјбһӣбһ…бһ·бһҸбҹ’бһҸбһҠбҹҶбһҺбһҫбһҡбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһ”бһ„бҹ’бһҖбһҫбһҸбһӮбҹ’бһҡбһ”бҹӢбһҠбҹҶбһҺбһ¶бһҖбҹӢбһҖбһ¶бһӣбҹ”
